Greece players told to play 'difficult' England fixture after George Baldock death as UEFA have 'no room' for postponement
arts.sum: The Greece national team players been rocked by the death of their team-mate

arts.ttl: England vs Greece: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Fotis Ioannidis is Greece's regular starting striker and scored three goals in the two games against the Republic of Ireland and Finland but he's not expected to feature against England due to an adductor injury. England's Nations League campaign continues on Thursday night as they aim to take top spot in Group 2 of League B off upcoming opponents Greece.

arts.ttl: Greece 'request to postpone England game' following George Baldock's tragic death
arts.sum: Greece's players are said to be in a 'state of shock' that they are being asked to play the game following the death of their team-mate, who had won 12 international caps

arts.ttl: Report: What Everton now think of their Anthony Gordon post after backlash from Jamie Carragher

arts.sum: Andy Newport manned the phone and the national team supporters are up in arms

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley has shock Harry Kane replacement plan as England plot all-out attack against Greece
arts.sum: Three Lions set to experiment without their injured captain at Wembley, including a surprise new role for Jude Bellingham

arts.ttl: Southgate gives ‘for sure’ response to Ten Hag rumours
arts.sum: Southgate is certainly not exerting pressure on Man Utd’s ownership group and speaking at the European Club Association (ECA) General Assembly in Athens, he refuted claims that he is ready to jump at the chance of managing the Old Trafford side. Manchester United have been heavily linked with a move for former England manager Gareth Southgate, who has broken his silence of the prospect of replacing Erik ten Hag in the Old Trafford dugout.

arts.ttl: Carsley's England style like Guardiola - Stones
arts.sum: England defender John Stones has said interim boss Lee Carsley is instilling a similar style of football to the one he has enjoyed under Pep Guardiola at Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Greece make black armband request after Baldock passing
arts.sum: The Greek Football Federation have confirmed that they have requested UEFA to allow their players to wear black armbands in their upcoming Nations League games with England and the Republic of Ireland, following the sudden passing of George Baldock.
